zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Vitré於1069年6月17日出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，她的父親André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré4歲，母親Agnes Mortain16歲。她和Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1139年6月1日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Vitré于1069年6月17日出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，她的父亲André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré4岁，母亲Agnes Mortain16岁。她和Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1139年6月1日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Vitré was born on 17 June 1069, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, was 4 and her mother, Agnes Mortain, was 16. She had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby. She died on 1 June 1139, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Merevale, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Vitré est née le 17 juin 1069, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Agnes Mortain, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1139, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Vitré am 17. Juni 1069 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré 4 und ihre Mutter Agnes Mortain 16. Sie hatte mit Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1139 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Merevale, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Vitré è nata il il 17 giugno 1069 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, aveva 4 anni e sua madre, Agnes Mortain, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby. Morì il 1 giugno 1139, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Merevale, Warwickshire, England.

ja.Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルe
ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Vitréが1069年6月17日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitréは4歳，母Agnes Mortainは16歳であった。彼女はRobert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derbyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1139年6月1日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで69歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Vitré(이)가 1069년 6월 17일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré(은)는 4세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Mortain(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1139년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 머에발에 묻혔다.

pt.17 June 1069–1 June 1139: 17 de junho de 1069–1 de junho de 1139
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Vitré nasceu em 17 de junho de 1069, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Mortain, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1139, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Vitré родилась 17 июня 1069 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Mortain, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby. Она умерла 1 июня 1139 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.17 June 1069–1 June 1139: 17 de junio de 1069–1 de junio de 1139
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Vitré nació el 17 de junio de 1069, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, tenía 4 años y su mamá, Agnes Mortain, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby. Murió el 1 de junio de 1139, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
